headline: Is Medtronic plc (MDT) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is MDT a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Medtronic plc on TheDividendPrince’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on MDT. Medtronic plc’s share was trading at $80.98 as of June 26th. MDT’s trailing and forward P/E were 21.71 and 13.59 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Medtronic plc […]

headline: Here is Why Medtronic (MDT) is One of the Best Long Term Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds
summary: Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) is one of the best long term stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On June 8, Medtronic received FDA 510(k) clearance for its Nellcor pulse oximetry system featuring the new Nell-EQ intelligent processor. This technology is engineered to provide more consistent and reliable pulse rate and oxygen saturation monitoring across various patient […]
